overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game (Starfield) showing a character in a spacesuit with a red backpack exploring an industrial interior space. The character walks through a communal area featuring a pool table and kitchen, approaching NPCs near metal shelving in a warmly lit, metallic environment.

events.description: character rounds the corner of the pool table, changing direction slightly toward the kitchen

agents.ego_description: walking steadily from the stairs area around the pool table toward the kitchen counter in the back

entered.detail: green felt pool table with yellow balls, central feature of the room
industrial metal staircase with railings leading to upper level
long metal kitchen counter with stools and cooking equipment against the back wall
exposed industrial piping and ductwork running across the ceiling
warm yellow ceiling lights hanging from the industrial ceiling
large potted tree or shrub near the staircase
tall red metal shelving unit against the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an industrial lounge area featuring a prominent green pool table in the center. Warm artificial lighting illuminates the metal walls and exposed ceiling pipes. The character moves past a metal staircase on the right and a large potted plant, heading toward a kitchen counter area in the back of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: kitchen and storage area with metal shelving

events.description: character stops walking and stands near two NPCs by the kitchen counter
character resumes walking toward the doorway on the left side of the room

agents.ego_description: approaching two NPCs standing near the kitchen, pausing briefly, then continuing toward a doorway

notable_agents.action: standing still near the kitchen counter wearing a white tunic
standing near metal shelves wearing dark clothing, then turning toward the doorway

entered.detail: white refrigerator unit next to the kitchen counter
metal doorway with illuminated frame leading to another room

segments.scene_description: The character approaches two NPCs standing near the kitchen counter and metal shelving. After a brief pause, the character continues moving toward a doorway on the left while the NPC in dark clothing turns to face the same direction. The pool table and stairs recede from view as the focus shifts to the storage area with red metal shelves and the exit doorway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an industrial lounge that transitions from a wide communal area into a narrow storage corridor. It begins by tracking the character past a green pool table and a large potted plant, moving under exposed ceiling pipes and warm artificial lighting. As the character advances, the scene shifts toward a kitchen counter where two NPCs stand beside metal shelving. The camera then glides past these figures, causing the pool table and stairs to recede from view while the focus narrows toward a doorway on the left. Finally, the perspective settles on a storage area defined by red metal shelves as the character moves toward the exit.
